title: Dashboard shows key stats cards after login
description: Verifies the post-login dashboard loads and displays the three primary stat cards for employees, KPI plans, and bulk jobs.

title: Quick action navigates from Dashboard to KPI plan management
description: Verifies the KPI quick action card on the dashboard routes the user to the KPI plan management page.

title: Sidebar navigation routes from Dashboard to Achievements
description: Verifies the sidebar can be used to navigate from the dashboard overview to the achievements page.

title: Quick action navigates from Dashboard to Bulk Upload
description: Verifies the Bulk Upload quick action card on the dashboard routes the user to the bulk upload page.

steps.description: Click the "Bulk Upload" quick action card

title: Theme toggle switches the dashboard theme state
description: Verifies that the theme toggle can be used from the dashboard UI and produces a visible theme change.

title: Logout redirects to login screen
description: Verifies that clicking logout from the dashboard returns the user to the login page.

title: Dashboard layout renders sidebar and primary navigation items
description: Verifies the dashboard shell renders expected navigation affordances for moving between major sections.

title: Create a KPI plan with one KPI detail row for a selected period
description: Verifies a user can create a KPI plan by selecting a period, completing one KPI detail row, and submitting the form so the plan appears in the list.

steps.description: Click the KPI menu item/link in the dashboard navigation
Select a period from the period selector dropdown

title: Update achievement actual values and evidence and see recalculated plan metrics
description: Verifies a user can update actual values and evidence URLs for KPI details and see the achievement percentage and score reflect the updates after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select a KPI plan from the list

title: Save actual value and evidence for a single KPI detail and confirm success feedback
description: Verifies saving achievement updates provides visible confirmation that changes were saved.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select a KPI plan from the list
Type "50" into the first KPI detail "Actual value" field
Type "https://example.com/evidence" into the first KPI detail "Evidence URL" field

title: Persist manager comment on a KPI detail for an approved plan
description: Verifies a manager comment can be added to a KPI detail on an approved KPI plan and is still visible after saving.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select an approved KPI plan from the list
Type "Reviewed and verified." into the first KPI detail "Manager comment" field

title: Manager comment remains visible after save on the selected plan
description: Verifies the manager comment is visible on-screen after saving (persistence confirmation within the same session/view).

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select an approved KPI plan from the list

title: Invalid evidence URL shows validation error and prevents save
description: Verifies entering an invalid evidence URL format shows a visible validation error message when saving.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select a KPI plan from the list
Type "not-a-url" into the first KPI detail "Evidence URL" field

title: Evidence URL accepts a valid HTTPS link without showing an error
description: Verifies a properly formatted HTTPS evidence URL does not trigger validation errors on save.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select a KPI plan from the list
Type "https://example.com/proof" into the first KPI detail "Evidence URL" field

title: Real-time calculation indicators are visible after entering an actual value
description: Verifies the UI shows calculated achievement percentage and/or score indicators when actual values are entered.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select a KPI plan from the list
Type "10" into the first KPI detail "Actual value" field

title: Save button updates achievement data and keeps the user on Achievements page
description: Verifies saving achievement changes does not navigate away unexpectedly and remains within the achievements workflow.

steps.description: Click on "Achievements" in the dashboard navigation
Select a KPI plan from the list

title: Create a new user from the Users page
description: Verifies an admin can create a new user and see it appear in the user list.

steps.description: Click the "Users" link in the dashboard navigation
Type "E2E-EMP-1001" into the Employee ID field
Type "E2E Test User" into the Full Name field
Select the first available option from the Manager dropdown

title: Filter users by department code
description: Verifies the department filter narrows results and displays users belonging to the selected department.

steps.description: Click the "Users" link in the dashboard navigation
Select "Engineering" from the Department filter dropdown
Select "All" from the Department filter dropdown
Verify element "User list table" is visible

title: Add User modal validates required email field
description: Verifies the create user form shows a visible validation message when the email is missing.

steps.description: Click the "Users" link in the dashboard navigation
Type "E2E-EMP-2001" into the Employee ID field
Type "E2E Missing Email" into the Full Name field
Select the first available option from the Manager dropdown
Verify text "Email is required" is visible

title: Paginate the user list
description: Verifies the user list supports pagination and changes visible content when moving to the next page.

steps.description: Click the "Users" link in the dashboard navigation

title: Non-admin view shows restricted controls on Users page
description: Verifies that a non-admin user cannot see or use Add/Edit/Reset Password controls on the Users page.

steps.description: Click the "Users" link in the dashboard navigation
Verify element "Add User button" is not visible
Verify element "Edit button" is not visible
Verify element "Reset Password button" is not visible

title: Bulk Upload page shows a visible job list/status tracking section
description: Verifies the Bulk Upload page includes a visible jobs/status area so users can track queued/processing/completed/failed states.

steps.description: Click "Bulk Upload" in the dashboard navigation

title: Create a new evaluation period successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated user can create a new period and see it appear in the periods list.

steps.description: Type "E2E Period - Q1" into the period name field
Type "2026-01-01" into the start date field
Type "2026-03-31" into the end date field
Select "Quarterly" from the cycle type dropdown
Verify text "E2E Period - Q1" is visible

title: View periods list and status badges
description: Verifies the periods page loads and shows periods with visible status indicators.

title: Create period validation: end date before start date
description: Verifies the UI blocks saving when end date is earlier than start date and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "E2E Invalid Date Period" into the period name field
Type "2026-04-01" into the start date field
Type "2026-03-01" into the end date field
Verify text "End date must be after start date" is visible

title: Create period validation: required fields missing
description: Verifies required field validation is shown when attempting to save an empty Create Period form.

steps.description: Verify text "Period name is required" is visible

title: Save updated cap multiplier and grade thresholds successfully
description: Verifies an authenticated user can update cap multiplier and grade thresholds and sees a success confirmation with updated values displayed.

steps.description: Type "1.5" into the cap multiplier field

title: Edit grade threshold values and confirm they persist after save
description: Verifies changes to grade A/B/C/D thresholds can be saved and the updated threshold values are shown on the page.

steps.description: Type "90" into the Grade A threshold field
Type "80" into the Grade B threshold field

title: Validation error when a threshold is out of range
description: Verifies the UI prevents saving when a grade threshold is outside the allowed 0–100 range and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Type "110" into the Grade A threshold field

title: Validation error when thresholds overlap or are not strictly ordered
description: Verifies saving is blocked and a validation error is shown when grade thresholds overlap or violate expected ordering.

steps.description: Type "80" into the Grade A threshold field
Type "85" into the Grade B threshold field

title: Preview grade assignment for a sample score
description: Verifies the preview tool assigns and displays a grade for an entered sample score.

steps.description: Type "92" into the sample score field

title: Preview updates when sample score changes
description: Verifies the preview result changes when a different sample score is entered and preview is run again.

steps.description: Type "95" into the sample score field
Type "55" into the sample score field

title: Cap multiplier field rejects non-numeric input with visible error
description: Verifies the cap multiplier input enforces numeric validation and shows a visible error when non-numeric text is provided.

steps.description: Type "abc" into the cap multiplier field

title: Page shows existing scoring configuration on load
description: Verifies the scoring configuration page loads and displays current configuration sections such as cap multiplier and grade thresholds.

title: Audit Log: Navigate to Audit Log and view first page of entries with details visible
description: Verifies the audit log page loads and shows a paginated list with IP and user agent details visible for entries.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu

title: Audit Log: Pagination - go to next page and see different page of results
description: Verifies pagination works by moving from the first page to the next page of audit log entries.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu

title: Audit Log: Pagination - go next then back to previous page
description: Verifies the user can move forward and then return to the prior page using pagination controls.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu

title: Audit Log: Apply filters by action, user, and date range then search
description: Verifies filtering by action type, user, and date range returns a filtered audit log list.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu
Select an option from the "Action" dropdown
Select an option from the "User" dropdown

title: Audit Log: Apply filters by action, user, and date range then verify filtered results show
description: Completes the filter flow by setting end date and searching, then verifies filtered results are displayed.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu

title: Audit Log: Invalid date range shows validation error (start date after end date)
description: Verifies the UI prevents searching with an invalid date range and shows a visible validation message.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu

title: Audit Log: Invalid date range - verify error text is visible
description: Verifies a clear error message is shown for a start date that is after the end date.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu
Verify text "Invalid date range" is visible

title: Audit Log: Reset clears action/user/date filters and restores unfiltered list
description: Verifies the Reset control clears all filters and the full unfiltered audit list is shown again.

steps.description: Click the "Audit Log" item in the navigation menu
Select an option from the "Action" dropdown
